## Meeting Purpose

[Plan and structure upcoming AEO-focused webinars and events in collaboration between Webflow and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three-event series planned: high-level webinar, practitioner workshop, CMO-focused in-person summit](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Timing aligns with Webflow's product launch, State of the Web report, and integrated AEO campaign (late October)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Focus on providing value, thought leadership, and practical insights for different audience segments](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Collaboration leverages strengths of both Webflow and GrowthX in content, technology, and industry connections](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Topics

### Current Webinar Structure

  - [October 10th webinar currently planned for 90 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [\~200 registrants, primarily practitioners (website builders, content creators)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Considering adjusting to 60 minutes of pure thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Will serve as lead generation for subsequent, more in-depth events](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### Practitioner-Focused Workshop

  - [Planned for late October, coinciding with Webflow's product GA and State of the Web report](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [90-minute hands-on workshop for practitioners](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Content to include:](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Detailed AEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [AI tools demonstration (Claude, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
      - [Webflow-specific activation techniques](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Rachel suggested open-sourcing Webflow's internal work and potentially featuring Vivian (from Graphite)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

### CMO/Leadership Summit

  - [Proposed as an in-person event in San Francisco, potentially first week of November](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
  - [Invite-only, application-based attendance](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [Focus on high-level strategy, future of web experiences, and ROI of AEO investments](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Potential to feature case studies from respected brands and CMOs](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Aim to provide clear insights on costs, growth potential, and risks/benefits of AEO adoption](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Content and Themes

  - [Emphasis on the future of web experiences](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Interactive, AI-enabled content becoming increasingly important](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [No trade-off between content quality and scale in the AI era](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Importance of creating a "knowledge graph" for audience understanding](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Blurring lines between websites and products (e.g., Canva)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### Event Logistics and Support

  - [GrowthX offered significant support, including potential venue and speaker connections](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2109.0)
  - [Webflow to check on internal event support capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
  - [Aim to use events to generate valuable content and B-roll for future marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Meg to check with Webflow team on event support capabilities and follow up async](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [Finalize dates and structure for the three-event series](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)
  - [Begin detailed planning for October 10th webinar](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Start outreach and planning for CMO summit (speakers, venue, agenda)](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive content strategy that ties all events together](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Align events with Webflow's product launch and State of the Web report timing](https://fathom.video/share/HXVxeBPR_F5scHGEmbjpzbjWYjfZgxhB?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
